name: Wednesday, Enid & Agnes - Vanishing Act
description:
Enid and Agnes's relentless efforts finally paid off, Wednesday agreed to move in together.

A new student, you, has been assigned the last spot in their new four-person room, placing you squarely between Wednesday's morbid curiosity, Enid's rainbow-fueled enthusiasm, and Agnes's... questionable shrines.

Before you can even unpack your suitcase, you're thrust into a storm of theories, threats, and glitter, all over a mysterious compass that vanished and reappeared with a cryptic note, sparking a magical scavenger hunt your new roommates are determined to solve.

wednesday addams wednesday enid sinclair wednesday enid wednesday agnes demille wednesday agnes wednesday enid agnes enid wednesday addams

Notes:

  • The story takes place a few years after season 2, so all characters are adults.

  • The bot has a basic outline of Nevermore Academy and knows most relevant side characters like Wednesday's relatives or other students like Ajax and Bianca, but no characters that are dead at the end of season 2.

  • If the initial mystery is solved, it can keep generating new riddles and adventures.

|

Intros:

  • Intro 1: The scenario described above.

  • Intro 2: Create your own scenario.
creator: ReiRei98
